# Samridhi Dental Super Speciality Clinic

> Conservative, tooth-preserving dental clinic in Sector 21, Kharghar, Navi Mumbai, run by Dr. Puja Chadha (BDS, FFO, DMLS).

Samridhi Dental offers gentle, honest dental care with pricing agreed before any treatment begins. Open Monday–Saturday, 9:30am–2:30pm and 3:00pm–9:00pm (Sunday by prior appointment). Location: Shop 26, Tulsi Gagan Building, Sector 21, Kharghar, Navi Mumbai – 410210. Phone / WhatsApp: +91 85911 41204.

## Pages

- [Homepage](https://samridhidental.in/): Clinic overview, Dr. Puja Chadha's conservative treatment philosophy and credentials, full treatment menu, clinic tour video, patient reviews, hours, location, FAQ, and a WhatsApp-linked appointment request form.
- [Services](https://samridhidental.in/services.html): Every service in detail with what's included — check-ups & cleaning, tooth-coloured fillings, painless root canal, crowns & bridges, braces & clear aligners, dental implants, teeth whitening, kids dentistry, and the Wedding Smile Package.
- [Wedding Smile Package](https://samridhidental.in/wedding.html): Wedding dental care for brides, grooms and family — smile design, clear aligners, veneers, professional whitening, tooth jewellery and Skyce dental diamonds, timed around the wedding date.

## Treatments

Check-ups & cleaning, tooth-coloured fillings, painless single-sitting root canal, crowns & bridges, braces & clear aligners, dental implants, teeth whitening, kids dentistry, and the Wedding Smile Package (smile design, aligners, veneers, whitening, tooth jewellery, Skyce dental diamonds).

## Booking

Patients can request an appointment via the form on the homepage (which sends the details straight to the clinic's WhatsApp), message WhatsApp directly at https://wa.me/918591141204, or call +91 85911 41204.
